entry.title: [NFLNBC] Fernando Mendoza signs rookie deal with Raiders; Tyreek Hill's recovery | PFT PM (FULL) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Mike Florio reacts to No. 1 overall pick Fernando Mendoza finally signing his rookie deal with the Raiders, analyzing what it means for Las Vegas before exploring the latest surrounding Tyreek Hill's personal updates regarding his recovery from injury. Next, he shares what the No. 1 training camp issue appears to be and shares his thoughts on Jon Gruden's looming return to an NFL broadcast booth. To wrap things up, he opens up the mailbag to assess several topics including the NFL's future in Canada, if field sponsors will ever be allowed and much more. #NBCSports #NFL #profootballtalk

entry.title: [NFLNBC] Signs point to Aaron Donald return; Cardinals exec under investigation | PFT PM (FULL) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Mike Florio shares his thoughts on Aaron Donald seriously considering a return to the NFL and Los Angeles Rams before sinking his teeth into Cardinals executive Ryan Gold being under investigation by the Arizona Department of Gaming. Next, he gets into Christian Gonzalez waiting on Devon Witherspoon to sign a new deal before opening the Pandora's Box that consists of the ongoing ESPN layoffs. entry.summary:
Drew Brees talks about working on his Hall of Fame speech, identifies the worst football conditions he ever played in, shares why he believes the NFL should have grass fields, why he loved training camp, and more. #NBCSports #NFL #DanPatrickShow » Watch SNF on Peacock: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Subscribe to NFL on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC?sub_confirmation=1 » Get more NFL news on NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com/nfl

NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
Sunday Night is Football Night on NBC as SNF continues to be America’s #1 Primetime show. NBC is also home to two NFL playoff games each season – one Wild Card Playoff game and one Divisional Playoff game – and offers full streaming rights on NBC Sports.com and the NBC Sports App.
Emmy Award winners Cris Collinsworth and Mike Tirico follow all the action from the booth, along with Melissa Stark from the field.
